S.FORM: Marcus Brown kawas tay 1974, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 4, Marcus Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
Marcus Brown kawas tay 1974, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 4, Marcus Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: marʦ~ʨus~ɕ βrown kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, marʦ~ʨus~ɕ βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
